message:
test(core): property-based tests for recorder_audit, storage_telemetry, workflows modules

Add three new proptest files covering pure/testable invariants:

- proptest_recorder_audit.rs (30 tests): access tier total order, hash chain
  integrity under arbitrary sequences, tamper detection, ordinal monotonicity,
  memory limits, drain/resume continuity, serde roundtrips

- proptest_storage_telemetry.rs (25 tests): health tier classify monotonicity,
  counter additivity, error counting, SLO evaluation, diagnostic consistency,
  config threshold ordering, serde roundtrips

- proptest_workflows.rs (43 tests): StepResult serde roundtrip and state
  predicates, lock manager mutual exclusion and RAII guards, broadcast
  precondition checks, BroadcastResult count invariants, session ID validation,
  FallbackNextStepPlan builders, WorkflowDescriptor validation, failure handler
  interpolation, resume command formatting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
